calendar.matters:
Amended Notice Of Motion And Motion For Assignment And Restraining Order Of Certain Patents Of Judgment Debtor Lit Motors Corporation [Cal. Code Civ. Proc. 128(A)(4), 708.510, 708.520]
Off Calendar Jan-07-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Jessica N. Leal, Esq. of FREITAS & WEINBERG LLP, T:650.730.5508, for plaintiff/moving party;
Daniel Kim, T:971.506.1457, defendant appearing in his own behalf.

RULING: The matter was heard concurrently with CGC-19-573844. Mr. Kim is defendant in both cases. Mr. Kim's request to continue the hearing was denied. Mr. Kim argues that service of the motion was improper. After arguments, the Court concluded that both the company and Mr. Kim received proper notice of the motion. Therefore, the Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFFS YANIV GELNIK, SETH WHITAKER, BARAK KIRSCHNER's Amended Motion For Assignment And Restraining Order Of Certain Patents Of Judgment Debtor LIT Motors Corporation [Cal. Code Civ. Proc. 128(A)(4), 708.510, 708.520] is granted. No opposition filed.

Order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com
